# Chef Trev Presents

> Chef Trev Presents is a Los Angeles experiential private dining company founded by Chef Trevor Brown. It creates candlelit, family-style, multi-course dinners — most famously at the Bamboo Oasis, a bamboo-lined garden — designed to make guests feel seen, heard, and loved. It is not a catering company: every night is designed end to end, from sourcing to seating, so guests connect with each other, not just the food.

## Key facts

- Founder & Head Chef: Trevor Brown ("Chef Trev") — self-taught, no culinary school
- Head of Experience: Adam Sanchez
- Location: Los Angeles, CA (travels for destination experiences)
- Flagship venue: The Bamboo Oasis, a bamboo-lined garden
- Track record: 45 events, 1,000+ guests
- Format: family-style, multi-course, candlelit, live music, served at one shared table
- Sourcing: seasonal, traceable, local Los Angeles farms — every source can be named
- No alcohol program — the experiences are built around food, music, and connection
- Mission: to make the world less lonely, around the table
